name: MikroTik Open Frame PSU GB60A-S12
title: MikroTik Open Frame PSU GB60A-S12
short_description: 12V 5A internal power supply for CCR1016 and CCR2004 series
description: The MikroTik GB60A-S12 is a reliable open-frame power supply designed to deliver stable and efficient performance for MikroTik networking equipment. With an output of 12 V and 5 A, providing a total power capacity of 60 W, it ensures consistent energy delivery even under demanding conditions. This model is compatible with several MikroTik devices, including the CCR1016 and CCR2004 series, as well as CRS312-4C+8XG-RM and CRS354-48G-4S+2Q+RM switches. The GB60A-S12 is an embedded, case-less power supply that can be used as a replacement for the primary unit in case of power failure, helping to minimize downtime and maintain continuous operation. Built with durability and reliability in mind, it is an excellent choice for professional network environments where uninterrupted performance is critical. The GB60A-S12 combines efficiency, simplicity, and compatibility in one dependable power solution.
